headline: Retailers look to bridge the K-shaped economy with dual playbooks of price cuts and premiumization
summary: As the K-shaped economy continues to divide Americans, retailers are courting lower-income customers with lower prices while catering to more affluent customers with premium offerings.

headline: Here is Why The Home Depot (HD) is One of the Best Low Risk Stocks to Buy in 2026
summary: The Home Depot Inc. (NYSE:HD) is one of the best low risk stocks to buy in 2026. On May 19, The Home Depot reported Q1 2026 sales of $41.8 billion, representing a 4.8% increase year-over-year. Comparable sales ticked up by 0.6% globally and 0.4% in the US, with foreign exchange rates providing a 55 basis […]
